import React from 'react'; import '../App.css'; const ProfileSlider = ({ user, profiles, isOpen, onClose }) => { if (!isOpen) return null; const formatDate = (dateString) => { if (!dateString) return 'N/A'; return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }); }; return (
e.stopPropagation()}>

👤 User Profile

{/* User Information Section */}

📋 Personal Information

Name: {user?.name || 'N/A'}
Phone: {user?.phone || 'N/A'}
Email: {user?.email || 'N/A'}
Address: {user?.address || 'N/A'}
Member Since: {formatDate(user?.createdAt)}
{/* Profiles Section */}

🎨 Profiles ({profiles?.length || 0})

{profiles && profiles.length > 0 ? (
{profiles.map((profile, index) => (
{profile.name}
Created: {formatDate(profile.createdAt)}
))}
) : (

No profiles created yet.

You can create profiles to customize your dashboard appearance.
)}
{/* Account Statistics */}

📊 Account Statistics

{profiles?.length || 0} Profiles
{user?.createdAt ? Math.floor((new Date() - new Date(user.createdAt)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 0} Days Active
Premium Account Type
); }; export default ProfileSlider;
